title: bellucia macrophylla
intro: Bellucia macrophylla, also known as the Panama hat plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Bellucia macrophylla is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of a poultice or topical application.
